mapper.insert:
SELECT User_inquiry_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO User_inquiry ( inquiry_id, member_id, category, title, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{inquiry_id}, #{member_id}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_INQUIRY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{MEMBER_ID} ORDER BY INQUIRY_ID DESC
